title: LAV 3X Keops Highball Glasses Water Juice Cocktail Tumblers 460ml/15.5oz
features: Generous Capacity: 460ml (15.5oz), perfect for serving a wide range of beverages.
Size: Dimensions: 13.5cm height and 8cm diameter for comfortable handling.
Elegant Design: Features an intricate cut-glass pattern for a sophisticated aesthetic.
Versatile Use: Suitable for water, juices, cocktails, mocktails, or even desserts.
description: The LAV Keops Glass Tumbler combines timeless elegance with modern functionality. Featuring a 460ml (15.5oz) capacity, this glass is ideal for serving a variety of beverages, including water, juices, cocktails, or mocktails. Its intricately cut design not only enhances its visual appeal but also reflects light beautifully, adding a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Crafted from durable, high-quality glass, the Keops Tumbler offers exceptional clarity and strength, making it suitable for both everyday use and special events. The dimensions—13.5cm in height and 8cm in diameter—provide a comfortable grip and stable base, making it as practical as it is stylish.
